title: Validated Action
description: Output from validation pipeline - a fully validated, sanitized, and authorized action ready for execution

validation_id.description: UUID v7 for this validation event

original_envelope.description: Original envelope that was validated (preserved for audit)

schema_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the action schema used for validation

rbac_rule_id.description: Stable identifier of the RBAC rule that authorized this action
